IS-001.title: HTML Language Declaration
IS-001.requirement: HTML lang attribute must be a valid BCP 47 code for Indian languages
IS-001.testing: Check if html element has valid lang attribute from approved list
IS-001.fix: Add lang='hi' for Hindi or lang='en-IN' for Indian English to the html element

IS-002.title: Devanagari Unicode for Hindi Content
IS-002.requirement: Hindi/Devanagari content must use Unicode (U+0900–U+097F range), not ASCII transliteration
IS-002.testing: Verify Hindi text contains Unicode characters in Devanagari range
IS-002.fix: Replace ASCII transliteration (e.g., 'namaste') with proper Devanagari Unicode (e.g., 'नमस्ते')

IS-003.title: Form Help Text Language Consistency
IS-003.requirement: Form field help text must be in the same language as the field label
IS-003.testing: Compare lang attribute of label and associated help text/description
IS-003.fix: Ensure help text uses the same language as the form label; translate if necessary

IS-004.title: Indian Date Format Support
IS-004.requirement: All date inputs must support DD/MM/YYYY format (Indian standard)
IS-004.testing: Verify date input accepts and displays DD/MM/YYYY format
IS-004.fix: Use pattern attribute with DD/MM/YYYY format; ensure placeholder shows Indian format

IS-005.title: Indian Phone Number Format
IS-005.requirement: Phone number inputs must accept +91 10-digit Indian mobile format
IS-005.testing: Verify phone input accepts Indian mobile numbers starting with 6-9
IS-005.fix: Update input pattern to accept Indian mobile format; show +91 prefix option

IS-006.title: Indian Currency Display
IS-006.requirement: Currency must be displayed using ₹ symbol with Indian numbering (lakhs/crores)
IS-006.testing: Verify currency uses ₹ symbol (not Rs. or INR) and Indian comma placement
